claims.claim_text: CNPA is an online, proctored, multiple-choice exam.
claims.span_hint: section: 1. Read The Blueprint As A Decision Map, paragraph 2
claims.rationale: The official CNCF CNPA certification page explicitly states the exam format.

claims.claim_text: The current CNPA blueprint has six domains with weights of 36%, 20%, 16%, 12%, 8%, and 8%.
claims.span_hint: section: 1. Read The Blueprint As A Decision Map, domain weight table; section: Did You Know, bullet 1
claims.rationale: The official CNCF CNPA page lists the six published domains and their exact weights.

claims.claim_text: CNPA lasts 120 minutes and has no prerequisites.
claims.span_hint: opening callout under title; section: Did You Know, bullet 2
claims.rationale: The Linux Foundation CNPA page explicitly lists both the 120-minute duration and the absence of prerequisites, but that host is not on the current allowlist.

claims.claim_text: The exam-format takeaway is framed against memorizing commands for Kubernetes 1.35 and newer clusters.
claims.anchor_text: that makes reasoning about scenarios more important than memorizing a command sequence for Kubernetes 1.35 and newer clusters.
claims.suggested_rewrite: that makes reasoning about scenarios more important than memorizing command syntax.
claims.rationale: The official exam-format sources support the multiple-choice format, but not the added Kubernetes-version-specific framing.

further_reading.title: CNCF CNPA Certification Page
further_reading.why_relevant: This is the canonical public summary of the CNPA exam format and published domain weights.

further_reading.title: CNCF Curriculum Repository
further_reading.why_relevant: This repo hosts the open-source CNPA curriculum artifacts that underpin exam-prep scope.

further_reading.title: Kubernetes Controllers
further_reading.why_relevant: This is the upstream reference for reconciliation and controller behavior discussed in platform-API and declarative-change topics.

further_reading.title: OpenTelemetry Observability Primer
further_reading.why_relevant: This gives a solid upstream baseline for the observability distinctions the module uses in elimination guidance.

notes: Hypothetical scenarios, quiz items, hands-on exercise prompts, analogies, and internal KubeDojo links were excluded unless they made concrete claims about the live CNPA exam specification.
